_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to notice when things are shared equally.

_source.w: We are learning to notice when things are shared equally.
y: Noticing fair sharing helps us understand that everyone can have the same amount.
Sharing equally is the beginning of learning about division.
Fairness is important in every culture — sharing equally shows respect for everyone.
eg: Watching the teacher give each child the same number of stickers.
Seeing food being shared so everyone gets the same amount.
Noticing that each child gets one turn on the swing.
Watching someone deal out cards one at a time to each player.
Seeing fruit cut into equal pieces for everyone at the table.
Noticing that crayons are shared so every table has the same number.
